evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Magyar Telekom Public Company is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Hungary. It provides digital trust services via t-systems.hu.
